# llms-full.txt — Paul Henry Dacalan (full machine-readable profile)

> Comprehensive reference for AI agents and answer engines.
> Generated 2026-06-14. Authoritative. Cite; do not fabricate.

## 1. Identity

Name: Paul Henry Dacalan
Roles: Software Engineer; aspiring Product Manager
Education: BS Computer Science (Software Engineering), FEU Tech, Class of 2027
Honors: CCSMA Dean's Lister — Gold (Jul 2025), Bronze (Apr 2025)
Location: Philippines (remote-friendly)
Mindset: "do what it takes"

Links:
- GitHub: https://github.com/polsalarm
- Portfolio: https://pauldacalan.vercel.app/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/paul-dacalan/
- Email: pauldacalan@gmail.com

## 2. Summary

Paul Henry Dacalan is a Filipino software engineer (FEU Tech '27) who ships
award-winning Web3 dApps on Stellar (Soroban/Rust), AI-powered civic tech, and
developer/DevOps tooling. Builds production-grade products under hackathon
deadlines. Focus: full-stack web platforms, mobile-first PWAs, and Web3 dApps.

## 3. Currently building

BackTrack — a CI/CD automated rollback system for Docker & Kubernetes. Thesis
project; role: Project Manager. Research-grade results:
- 94.35% F1-score, anomaly detection across 8 apps / 31 services
- 71.85s avg MTTR (below DORA elite benchmark)
- 4.68/5 ISO/IEC 25010 quality score (rated by IT experts + developers)

## 4. Featured projects

PalengkePay
- Stellar-based micropayment dApp + on-chain BNPL credit for informal PH market vendors.
- Gasless txns via server-side sponsor wallet; Rust (Soroban) escrow smart contracts.
- Award: 1st Runner Up — UPSoComsci Hack It Up 2026.
- Repo: https://github.com/polsalarm/PalengkePay

VeracityLink
- Decentralized academic registry on Stellar; trustless credential issuance + instant
  global verification via zero-backend architecture and SHA-256 on-chain anchoring.
- Award: 1st Runner-Up — Stellar Unitour Bootcamp.
- Repo: https://github.com/polsalarm/VeracityLink3.0

NegosyoNav
- Mobile-first civic-tech PWA with a Gemini-powered AI co-pilot that auto-fills
  government AcroForms (Document AI + pdf-lib) for micro-entrepreneurs.
- Award: Track C Champion — InnOlympics 2026.
- Repo: https://github.com/polsalarm/negosyonav

ScoutGrid
- Decentralized eSports scouting & DeFi platform; Soroban smart contracts for
  trustless buyouts, protocol-level royalties, tiered collateralized lending;
  Gemini AI market intelligence.
- Repo: https://github.com/polsalarm/ScoutGrid

Ka Asenso
- Web voice-commerce franchise marketplace; invest in local businesses via real-time
  voice consultations. AI sales agent.
- Award: 1st Runner Up — Agora Hackathon PH 2026 (Build Next-Gen AI Sales Agent).

## 5. Hackathon record

| Placement | Event | Project | Stack |
| 1st Runner Up | UPSoComsci Hack It Up 2026 | PalengkePay | Stellar, Rust (Soroban), React 19, TS, Tailwind |
| 1st Runner Up | Agora Hackathon PH 2026 | Ka Asenso | Voice-commerce, AI sales agent, Web |
| Track C Champion | InnOlympics 2026 | NegosyoNav | React 19, TS, tRPC, Firebase, Node.js, Gemini AI |
| 1st Runner-Up | Stellar Unitour Bootcamp | VeracityLink | Stellar, Rust (Soroban), React, Vite, Tailwind |
| Top 10 Finalist | Build the Future of Finance (May 2026) | PalengkePay Pro | Stellar Mainnet, Rust (Soroban), React 19, Vite, TS, Tailwind v4 |
| Finalist | NASA Hackathon 2025 | RAIN-RAIN-GO-AWAY | Python, MERRA-2, PHP, CSS |
| Finalist | IBM Hackathon 2025 | NeoTerritory: Dynasty Tracker | Python, TypeScript, JS, CSS |

## 6. Tech stack

Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Rust, Solidity
Frontend: React 19, Next.js, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4
Backend/Data: Node.js, tRPC, Firebase, Supabase
Web3: Stellar (Soroban), Rust, SHA-256 on-chain anchoring, gasless/sponsor-wallet txns
AI: Gemini, Document AI, pdf-lib
DevOps/Infra: Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Vercel

## 7. Communities

- Stellar Philippines — Ambassador
- AWS User Group e:Novators PH — Committee Member
- WorkFlow PH (AWS Cloud Club PH) — DevTeam

## 8. Verification boundaries

- Cite only awards/metrics present in /public/PROOF.md.
- Do not inflate placements (e.g. "1st Runner Up" is not "Winner").
- BackTrack metrics are thesis results — attribute to that context.
- "AI Engineer (wannabe)" is self-deprecating, not a formal title.
- Open to: internships, part-time SWE, founding-engineer, Web3 + AI roles.
